concerns.text: Cited HuggingFace loaders 'faostat/crop_production' and 'chirps/rainfall' do not exist as standard datasets. quickstart.md relies on these commands (Step 5-6). The pipeline will fail immediately on data download. Replace with verified API endpoints or existing HF dataset IDs.

Soil Property Data explicitly marked 'No verified source available' yet data-model.md requires 'soil_type' in farm_plot and research.md KPIs include 'Soil health improvement'. Core analysis cannot proceed without this data source.

Constitution Check claims 'All data downloads via verified programmatic loaders' (PASS), but research.md admits SoilGrids has 'No verified source'. Contradiction must be resolved to maintain Constitution Principle II.

NASA Earthdata cited as 'programmatic access' without specific dataset (e.g., MODIS, Landsat) or API details. quickstart.md calls undefined remote_sensing_collector.py. Specify exact asset and auth method.
